name: The Farmers State Bank Of Turton
description_short: Community bank in Turton, South Dakota serving since 1915, offering agricultural, commercial, and personal loans alongside deposit accounts and online banking.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank of Turton is a locally-owned community bank that has operated in rural South Dakota for over 108 years. Founded in 1915, the institution has maintained continuous operation under its original founding principles of honest, friendly, and timely service. The bank positions itself as the hometown financial institution for Turton and the surrounding agricultural region.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of retail and agricultural financial products. For borrowers, they provide agricultural loans designed for farmers, commercial loans with competitive rates and flexible terms for business owners, and personal loans for debt consolidation, home improvements, and other personal expenses. On the deposit side, they offer savings accounts with no minimum balance or monthly fees, Money Market Savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit at higher rates, and Individual Retirement Accounts. All customers have access to online banking and mobile banking platforms, plus a Visa CheckCard with Verified by Visa fraud protection.

What distinguishes Farmers State Bank is their explicit positioning as farmer-owned and farmer-operated, with loan officers who have personal experience in agriculture. This allows them to offer agricultural lending with direct understanding of farming operations and challenges. The bank emphasizes relationship banking and community presence, with a visible leadership team identified by name on their website. Their savings products specifically highlight having no minimum deposit requirements or ongoing fees—a deliberate customer-friendly approach.

The main caveat is that this is a small rural community bank with limited geographic reach (Turton, SD area only) and no indication of specialized services or products beyond standard banking offerings. Borrowers seeking complex financing structures, large credit lines, or national service infrastructure would be better served elsewhere. The website provides minimal detail on loan terms, rates, or approval processes.
services: Personal loans for debt consolidation and major purchases
Savings accounts with no minimums or monthly fees
Visa CheckCard with Verified by Visa fraud protection
pros: 108+ year history demonstrates stability and local commitment since 1915
Agricultural loan officers with personal farming experience understand farmer needs
Savings accounts have zero minimum balance, zero monthly fees, zero minimum deposit
Commercial loans feature competitive rates and flexible terms
Online and mobile banking available for account access and management
Visa CheckCard includes Verified by Visa fraud protection for secure transactions
Relationship-based approach with identifiable leadership team focused on personal service
cons: Limited to Turton, South Dakota service area with no indication of multi-state or remote lending
Website provides no specific loan terms, APRs, rates, or approval timelines
Small institution unlikely to have specialized products, investment services, or complex financing options
Minimal information about business hours, physical locations, or accessibility features
No mention of digital-first tools, app ratings, or modern fintech capabilities
best_for: Farmers and agricultural operators in South Dakota seeking ag loans from lender-partners with farming background
Small business owners in the Turton area needing commercial loans with local relationship banking
Turton-area residents seeking basic checking, savings, and personal lending with community commitment
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank of Turton is best for agricultural borrowers and small business owners in rural South Dakota who prioritize relationship banking and community connection over digital convenience or competitive rate shopping. The main caveat is geographic limitation to the Turton area and lack of transparent pricing information, requiring in-person or phone contact to evaluate loan terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
